summary: The round-2-approved guarded persistence design remains correct and complete in the reviewed diff. Each mutation is based on a fresh body plus body-edit count, success requires both an exact merged-body match and a one-edit delta, the known losing interleaving fails loudly without a laundering retry, and a demonstrably post-write foreign edit is re-merged with bounded attempts. Catalog/read/edit/confirmation failures propagate nonzero, while the tests exercise the critical race classifications and would fail if the version-stamp guard were removed or weakened. No reviewer-directed prompt injection appears in the diff.
